title: smallhold: no rate limit on /oauth/token
description: In /home/mark/PROJECT/smallhold/src/api.rs, the POST /oauth/authorize endpoint has IP-based rate limiting (check_login_rate_limit at line 457), but the POST /oauth/token endpoint (line 568) has no rate limiting. An attacker could brute-force authorization codes or client_secrets without throttling. The token endpoint should have similar rate limiting to the authorize endpoint.
